extension.description: Detects unused CSS/SCSS code in your project, supporting React, Vue, Angular, Astro, Svelte, and many more frameworks
command.analyze.title: CSS: Detect unused selectors
command.openPanel.title: CSS: Open analysis panel
command.openSettings.title: CSS: Open extension settings
config.title: CSS/SCSS Unused Detector
config.highlightColor.desc: Background color for unused CSS selectors
config.highlightEnabled.desc: Enable background highlighting for unused selectors
config.codeLensEnabled.desc: Show reference count above CSS selectors
config.diagnosticSeverity.desc: Severity level for unused selector diagnostics
config.analyzeOnSave.desc: Automatically analyze when a file is saved
config.debounceDelay.desc: Delay in ms before auto-analysis after typing stops
config.scanDomApi.desc: Scan for DOM API usage: classList.add(), querySelector(), getElementById()
config.scanStyleBlocks.desc: Extract selectors from <style> blocks in code files
config.excludeFiles.desc: Specific file glob patterns to exclude (e.g. '**/*.min.css')
config.includeFileExtensions.desc: File extensions to scan for class/id usage
config.cssFileExtensions.desc: CSS file extensions to extract selectors from
